explanation: I had a high fever and was advised by my doctor to rest at home. I have a medical certificate available upon request.
A close family member was hospitalized unexpectedly and I needed to travel out of town to assist.
instructor_note: Approved. Please make up the missed quiz by Friday.

explanation: My car broke down on the way to campus and I could not find an alternative ride in time.
instructor_note: Denied. Please plan for alternative transportation in advance.
